meta_title: Removals and Storage in Sevenoaks, Kent - Mark Ratcliffe
meta_description: Office and House Removals and Storage services in Sevenoaks. We work with customers and businesses within the local area and across Tunbridge Wells, offering fantastic value removals with a friendly and reliable service. Free Quote Online.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Premier Removals in Sevenoaks, Kent

Mark Ratcliffe Moving - providing an exemplary moving, storage and packing service to residents and businesses.

How can we help you today?

Removals in Sevenoaks, Kent with Mark Ratcliffe Moving

Moving to a new home is one of life's most stressful events. There are so many things to remember and on top of that you have the task of trying to choose a reliable removal company. Securing good value for money, but also being confident that the team arriving on the morning of your move will be punctual, hardworking and equipped with the right training and equipment is vital.

We have worked in the UK domestic removals, storage market for over 30 years. With extensive knowledge of Sevenoaks and Kent, we are well respected within the moving industry and have developed a reputation for a quality removals service that competitors strive to achieve. With a dedicated staff training centre, our team are trained to the highest industry standards in packing, home and overseas moving, customer service and vehicle loading.

Professional Removal Company with Affordable Prices

Looking for house removal services? Unlike other removal companies, we offer a complete moving experience that takes care of every aspect of your move from start to finish. Whether you have a single piece of furniture that needs moving across town, or a 4 bedroom home whose contents need relocating up to Scotland - big or small, our removals service can handle it all.

Following your initial enquiry, we will visit your home (at a time convenient for you) to carry out a site survey. During this time we can discuss all aspects of your forthcoming move including any packing requirements, house clearance, or insurance for your valuable possessions, with a fixed quotation provided. On your moving day a fully trained and uniformed crew will arrive and lay down floor covers to protect your carpets, cover exposed doors and banisters etc. If requested, they will also pack and move your belongings with the utmost care and transport them safely to your new property.

Packing  

Alongside our popular house removals service we also provide a comprehensive packing option. Packing is time consuming and when you are moving home time is not always something you have a lot of. That is why we offer a full packing service, whether you require complete packing or simply some of the more fragile items to be specially packed, our team are trained in packing and will ensure your possessions are well protected. If you decide to carry out your own packing, we can also provide flat pack moving boxes, plain paper, bubble wrap, tape etc. All products are minimal in cost and they can be collected from our shop 

Self Storage Units in Sevenoaks

We offer secure self storage rooms to rent for customers who prefer to deposit and remove their own goods. The self storage units are available in Sevenoaks in various sizes with our most popular size is the 77 sqft which equates to 850 cubic feet / 24 cubic metres. This room is charged at £30 plus vat (per week) and with our storage rooms being much higher than local competitors and prices being over 50% less, you receive great value for money.

Removal Companies Near Me

We are proud to be Sevenoak's local removals company. Whether you need assistance moving within the area or further afield in the UK, or even abroad, Mark Ratcliffe Moving is ready to help. Our friendly and local team would be delighted to give you a quote without any obligation. Or for ease, fill out our online quote request form. Our opening hours are Mon - Sat 08.30 - 17.00 or we can arrange an appointment for any other time including Sundays. A 24/7 Service for our Self Store Customers is also available.
